meaning: n.旅行,狩猎远征,旅行队,旅行队(狩猎远征队)及装备
examples: It arrived while I was on safari.
He'd like to go on safari to photograph snakes and tigers.
Adrian Carr, a white Zambian, is one of the leading safari operators in the valley.
To get out on the water, organise a wildlife cruise with Elkhorn Slough Safari.
The article 'A do-it-yourself Namibian safari' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
